reason: Frontend layer spec index for verification expectations.
Verify Repository-Owned Trellis §3 contract is updated to project-level SDD ownership and roleTags plurality.
Confirm no new any types, helper functions have explicit return types, SddMode narrowing is exhaustive.
Confirm migration is registered, commands handle errors with documented error codes, no broadened capability scope.
Verify data flows correctly across SQLite → Rust → TS → React without mid-layer drift.
